LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Advanced_Weapons.descri: Military holotape containing the schematics and manufacturing processes for the Brotherhood Advanced Weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Advanced_Weapons.label: Holotape File: Brotherhood Advanced Weapons
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Elder_Regalia.descripti: Ceremonial robes and equipment befitting a Brotherhood Elder - the leaders of the organization.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Elder_Regalia.label: Elder Regalia
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Initiate_Equipment.desc: Basic uniforms and equipment for Brotherhood initiates and squires beginning their service.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Knight_Equipment.descri: Standard combat armor and fatigues used by Brotherhood Knights.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Knight_Equipment.label: Knight Equipment
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Outcast_Equipment.descr: Research the specialized equipment used by the Brotherhood Outcasts, including their distinctive armor and gear modifications.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Outcast_Equipment.label: Brotherhood Outcast equipment
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Paladin_Training.descri: Unlock advanced paladin equipment and power armor operation training for elite Brotherhood warriors.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Paladin_Training.label: Paladin Training
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Scribe_Attire.descripti: Specialized robes and field uniforms for the Brotherhood's scribes - those who preserve and study technology.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Scribe_Attire.label: Scribe Attire
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Sentinel.description: The highest rank of Brotherhood warriors. Sentinels are masters of combat and paragons of the Brotherhood's ideals.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Sentinel.label: Sentinel Training
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Specialized_Armor.descr: Advanced combat armor variants including recon armor and reinforced combat armor for specialized missions.
LanguageData.FCP_Research_BoS_Specialized_Armor.label: Specialized Knight Armor
